1: But grievous words stir up anger.
2: But the mouth of fools poureth out foolishness.
3: Beholding the evil and the good.
4: But perverseness therein is is a breach in the spirit.
5: But he that regardeth reproof is prudent.
6: But in the revenues of the wicked is trouble.
7: But the heart of the foolish doeth doeth not so.
8: But the prayer of the upright is is his delight.
9: But he loveth him that followeth after righteousness.
10: And And he that hateth reproof shall die.
11: How much more then the hearts of the children of men?
12: Neither will he go unto the wise.
13: But by sorrow of the heart the spirit is broken.
14: But the mouth of fools feedeth on foolishness.
15: But he that is of a merry heart hath hath a continual feast.
16: Than great treasure and trouble therewith.
17: Than a stalled ox and hatred therewith.
18: But he that is he that is slow to anger appeaseth strife.
19: But the way of the righteous is is made plain.
20: But a foolish man despiseth his mother.
21: But a man of understanding walketh uprightly.
22: But in the multitude of counsellors they are established.
23: And a word spoken spoken in due season, how good is it! is it!
24: That he may depart from hell beneath.
25: But he will establish the border of the widow.
26: But the words the words of the pure are are pleasant words.
27: But he that hateth gifts shall live.
28: But the mouth of the wicked poureth out evil things.
29: But he heareth the prayer of the righteous.
30: And And a good report maketh the bones fat.
32: But he that heareth reproof getteth understanding.
33: And before honour is is humility.
